The '''[[Sith academy]] of [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]]''' was established by the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] near the end of the [[New Sith Wars]]. They used it to [[Sith training|train]] [[Sith acolyte/Legends|Sith Acolytes]]. Trainees here were apprenticed to [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Masters]]. The skills learned here equipped adepts with abilities on par with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]]. These warriors made up the bulk of the Brotherhood's armies.
